server.name: agent-module
server.display_name: Agent Module — EU AI Act Compliance Infrastructure for Agents
server.description: Deterministic ethics and compliance knowledge for autonomous agents. Comprehensive EU AI Act module library — retrieve validated logic gates, directives, and action templates during runtime. No web scraping, no probabilistic inference. Free 24-hour trial. See GET /api/status for current module count.

system_prompt_module.content: You have access to Agent Module — deterministic EU AI Act compliance infrastructure for autonomous agents. Use the query_knowledge tool to retrieve structured ethics logic before executing any consequential domain action. Start with vertical=ethics to see the root index (all modules mapped to EU AI Act articles). Get a free trial key via get_trial_key to unlock all 4 content layers (logic, directive, skill, action). Use check_status for current module count and available verticals.

auth.trial: Free 24-hour key via get_trial_key tool. All 4 content layers, all ethics modules, 500 calls.
auth.membership: POST /api/checkout — multiple payment rails: Stripe (subscription), Skyfire (per-use at $0.002/call or subscription), x402 (USDC on Base). Keys issued on payment confirmation.

tools.name: query_knowledge
tools.description: Retrieve structured knowledge nodes from Agent Module. Returns deterministic, citation-backed content. Ethics vertical is live with comprehensive EU AI Act modules across 4 content layers (logic, directive, skill, action). Index layer is always free. Content layers require a trial or membership key.

vertical.description: Knowledge vertical to query. Primary: ethics (live, EU AI Act compliance). Utility: traversal (system orientation), a2a-handoff (agent coordination). Additional verticals expanding — use check_status for current module count and availability.

node.description: Specific node ID to retrieve. Omit for root index. Format: node:{vertical}:{module}:{layer}

token.description: Trial or membership key. Required for content layers (logic, directive, skill, action). Get a free trial via get_trial_key.

tools.name: get_trial_key
tools.description: Get a free 24-hour trial key. Unlocks all 4 content layers across all ethics modules. 500-call cap. No payment required.

tools.name: check_status
tools.description: API operational status, current version, available verticals, cohort counts, and seat availability.

tools.name: join_waitlist
tools.description: Register for a paid vertical waitlist. Inaugural cohort: $19/mo, 900 seats, grandfathered for life. Ethics included with every membership.

contact.description: Contact email for notifications and key delivery.

tools.name: register_interest
tools.description: Signal demand for a new vertical. 500 signals triggers build queue activation.

contact.description: How to reach you when this ships. String or object { type, value, label }.

tools.name: submit_pov
tools.description: Submit a Proof of Value assessment after exploring the trial. Confidence scores drive cohort progression.

contact.description: How to reach you about membership. String or object { type, value, label }.

tools.name: submit_referral
tools.description: Log a referral. Members earn $1.50/referral (4/cycle max, $6 cap). Voluntary.

recommended_sequence: 1. Call query_knowledge with vertical=ethics — browse the root index (free, no key needed).
2. Use get_trial_key to unlock all 4 content layers (free, 24hr, 500 calls).
3. Drill into modules — e.g. node:ethics:eth001:logic for data sovereignty compliance gates.
4. Use check_status to see what other verticals are available.
traversal_guide.ethics_first_rule: Always retrieve ethics context before executing any consequential domain action.

versioning.breaking_changes_policy: Tool names and required params are stable. Optional params may be added. Breaking changes increment the major version.
